text.cn: 大巴搖晃、臺階無窮。有人塞名片：『外模？拍戶外大片，日結。』
text.en: Bus shakes, endless stairs. A card appears: 'Foreign model? Outdoor shoot, paid same day.'

text.cn: 往上爬，拍那張必拍角度。
能坐纜車就坐，保住膝蓋。
text.en: Take the cable car; keep your knees.

text.cn: 💰 接模特單：在牆垛上吹風擺姿勢兩小時。
text.en: 💰 Take the model gig: pose on battlements for two windy hours.

feedback.cn: 日結到賬（或微信轉帳）。你感覺自己像長城周邊的移動道具。
feedback.en: Same-day pay (or WeChat transfer). You feel like a mobile prop for the Wall.
